title: Provider smoke echo
description: The trivial structured-output contract for the ONE Anthropic smoke request (DEC-0020). It is deliberately minimal and constrained-decoding compatible (object with additionalProperties:false, no length/numeric constraints, only const/enum): the smoke call asks the model to return exactly this shape so the ceremony verifies the live transport, structured-output mechanism, and accounting without any real task. It carries no truth authority — a smoke echo never becomes a claim.

acknowledgement.description: the fixed acknowledgement token the model is asked to return
